videos.headline: Oregon routs Colorado after Lanning's fiery pregame speech
videos.description: After Dan Lanning fired up the team pregame, Oregon goes out and puts up a huge first half en route to a 42-6 win over Colorado.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Oregon routs Colorado after Lanning's fiery pregame speech) ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Oregon strikes first with a TD on its first drive
videos.description: Noah Whittington plunges into the end zone to get Oregon started early against Colorado.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon strikes first with a TD on its first drive) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix makes the throw under pressure for an Oregon TD
videos.description: Bo Nix looks like he's going to run, but is able to stay on his feet and find Casey Kelly for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix makes the throw while being tackled for a TD) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon gets tricky with a fake punt in its own territory
videos.description: Oregon converts on a fake punt as defensive lineman Casey Rogers runs for a first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon gets tricky with a fake punt in its own territory) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix drops dime to Troy Franklin for Oregon TD
videos.description: Bo Nix goes over the top to Troy Franklin for a 16-yard Oregon touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix drops dime to Troy Franklin for Oregon TD) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colorado gets much needed INT in the second quarter
videos.description: Jahquez Robinson picks off Bo Nix for a much needed turnover for Colorado.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colorado gets much needed INT in the second quarter) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix finds a wide open Troy Franklin for a 36-yard TD
videos.description: Bo Nix lets it fly and finds Troy Franklin running free for a 36-yard Oregon touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix finds a wide open Troy Franklin for a 36-yard TD) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix fired up after rushing TD late in first half
videos.description: Bo Nix puts Oregon up 35-0 as he takes it in from 11 yards out for a rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix fired up after rushing TD late in first half) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lanning has more words for Colorado during halftime interview
videos.description: Dan Lanning says he hopes all the fans who have watched Colorado the past few weeks are still watching as Oregon leads 35-0 at halftime.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Lanning has more words for Colorado during halftime interview) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan James puts Oregon up 42-0 in the 3rd
videos.description: Jordan James scores Oregon's sixth touchdown of the game as he walks in easily.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan James puts Oregon up 42-0 in the 3rd) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders' late TD pass gets Colorado on the board
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders finds an open Michael Harrison for a 6-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shedeur Sanders' late TD pass gets Colorado on the board) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lanning: Colorado's fighting for clicks; we're fighting for wins
videos.description: Dan Lanning fires his team up pregame with a couple of shots at Colorado.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Lanning: Colorado's fighting for clicks, we're fighting for wins) 2023/09/23 ESHEET
